description_long: This is a modern sectional couch with a sleek, angular design and a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The upholstery is a solid, matte black material, likely faux leather or high-quality fabric, with subtle seams and minimal decorative elements. The couch features two rectangular back cushions and two matching seat cushions, all appearing firmly attached and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are broad, boxy, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the geometric silhouette. A thin, light-colored accent strip runs along the base, adding a touch of contrast and visual interest. The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden support structure.
description: A modern black sectional couch with a right-side chaise, boxy armrests, and a thin accent strip at the base. The design is sleek and minimal, with attached cushions and a low-profile silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the couch, the right-side chaise, two back cushions, and broad armrests.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the chaise extension and reveals a rectangular cutout or accent on the armrest base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the overall length, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Left side view shows the armrest with a matching cutout/accent and the end of the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two rectangular back cushions and two seat cushions, all attached and integrated into the frame; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid matte black upholstery with subtle seam lines and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base for a low-profile appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are broad, straight, and boxy, matching the height of the backrest, with a rectangular accent cutout at the base.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest with two attached rectangular cushions, providing a unified and modern look.
